abstract.text: A script that is executed when exporting the project.

inlineContent.text: s are automatically invoked whenever the user exports the project. Their most common use is to determine what files are being included in the exported project. For each plugin,
is called at the beginning of the export process and then
is called for each exported file.

abstract.text: Variant objects box various Godot Objects, you create them with one of the
constructors, and you can retrieve the contents using the various extension
constructors that are declared on the various types that are wrapped.
